SGT

The Saju Guide Team

Curators, researchers, and cultural enthusiasts dedicated to Korean heritage.

Cultural Research Traditional Philosophy Educational Content

Expertise and Background

The Korean Saju Guide Team is a collective of researchers and content curators with a deep passion for Korean cultural traditions. Our members come from various backgrounds, including East Asian studies, cultural anthropology, and digital education.

We pride ourselves on our meticulous approach to documenting Saju (Four Pillars of Destiny). By cross-referencing traditional texts with modern interpretations, we aim to provide an accessible yet authentic portal into this profound knowledge system.

Our Editorial Standards

Every piece of content on this platform goes through a rigorous review process:

  • Cultural Accuracy: We ensure that terminology and concepts (like the Five Elements and Ten Gods) are presented in alignment with traditional Korean practices.
  • Educational Focus: We strictly avoid deterministic "fortune-telling" claims, focusing instead on the self-reflective and psychological aspects of the practice.
  • Accessibility: We translate complex cosmological concepts into clear, modern English without losing the original essence.

Commitment to Ethical Practice

We understand that astrology-related content requires a high degree of responsibility. Our team is committed to:

  • Promoting Saju as a tool for personal growth and cultural appreciation.
  • Deterring users from making major life decisions based solely on chart readings.
  • Maintaining a "Privacy-First" approach, ensuring no personal birth data is ever stored on our servers.

Connect With Us

We are always looking to improve our resources. If you have any questions about the tradition of Saju or suggestions for our team, please visit our Contact page.

⚠️ Entertainment & Self-Reflection Only: The information provided on this site is for cultural education and entertainment purposes only. It is not a substitute for professional medical, legal, psychological, or financial advice.
